subject: Your Netflix subscription renews in 2 days
body_text:
Hi there,

Your Netflix Standard with ads plan (Rs.649/month) will automatically renew on 2026-03-28. To ensure uninterrupted service, please make sure your payment method on file is up to date.

If you'd like to update your payment method or manage your subscription, please visit your account settings.

Thank you for being a Netflix member!

The Netflix Team

subject: FINAL NOTICE: Electricity bill overdue
body_text:
URGENT NOTICE

Dear Customer,

This is a FINAL NOTICE regarding your overdue electricity bill.

Outstanding Amount: Rs.3,200
Original Due Date: 2026-03-21 (5 days ago)
Service Account: BESC-9872341

Your electricity connection is at risk of disconnection. Please pay immediately to avoid service interruption.

Payment options: Online banking, BBMP counters, or our app.

BESCOM Customer Care

subject: Spotify Premium – Receipt for Rs.119
body_text:
Hi,

Thank you for your payment!

Receipt Details:
Plan: Spotify Premium Individual
Amount Paid: Rs.119
Payment Date: 2026-03-26
Next Billing Date: 2026-04-26
Payment Method: Visa ending in 4242

You can access your receipt and billing history in your account settings.

Enjoy your music!
Spotify

subject: Reminder: Car insurance renewal next week
body_text:
Dear Customer,

This is a friendly reminder that your ICICI Lombard car insurance policy is due for renewal.

Policy Number: ICICI-POL-2024-98765
Vehicle: Your registered vehicle
Policy Expiry Date: 2026-04-02 (7 days from now)
Renewal Premium: Rs.8,500

Driving without valid insurance is illegal. Avoid a lapse in coverage by renewing now.

Click here to renew: https://icicilombard.com/renew

ICICI Lombard Team

subject: Your Notion subscription – invoice attached
body_text:
Hi,

Here is your invoice for your Notion subscription.

Invoice #INV-2026-1234
Plan: Notion Plus (Annual)
Amount: Rs.1,600
Billing Period: 2026-03-26 to 2027-03-26

Account Activity Note: Our records show your last login was 62 days ago on 2026-01-24. We hope Notion is still serving you well!

You can download your invoice from your billing settings.

Thank you,
The Notion Team
